home.hero_subtitle: Uncover the untamed beauty, investment paradise, and cultural heritage of South America's best-kept secret. From the wild Chaco to the Jesuit missions, your adventure starts here.
home.featured_tours_subtitle: Carefully crafted experiences that bring you the best of Paraguay, from Chaco expeditions to cultural immersions in the Jesuit missions.
home.destinations_subtitle: Paraguay awaits with landscapes ranging from endless wetlands to vibrant cities. Every corner has a story to tell you.
home.testimonials_subtitle: Real stories from those who dared to discover Paraguay and took home unforgettable memories.
home.blog_subtitle: Travel tips, adventure stories, and the latest Paraguay news you need to know before your next trip.
home.newsletter_description: Subscribe to receive exclusive offers, travel guides, and the latest Paraguay news straight to your inbox.

adventure.meta_description: Experience the wild adventure of Paraguay: Chaco expeditions, Pantanal safaris, river kayaking, and unique South American wildlife spotting.
adventure.hero_subtitle: For those who seek raw thrills and nature in its purest form
adventure.intro: Paraguay hides one of the wildest ecosystems on the planet. Venture into the Chaco, the great green desert where jaguars and pumas reign among ancient quebracho forests. Navigate the Paraguayan Pantanal, the world's largest wetland, where caimans, capybaras, and hundreds of bird species await. Paddle the Paraguay and Parana rivers by kayak, fish for the legendary dorado, or ride horseback through estancias that have upheld ranching traditions for centuries. Here, adventure is not a theme park — it is real life.

culture.meta_description: Discover Paraguay's cultural heritage: Jesuit missions, Guarani culture, nanduti lace, ao po'i weaving, traditional gastronomy, and unique festivals.
culture.hero_subtitle: Where Guarani history and colonial legacy meet
culture.intro: Paraguay is the only truly bilingual nation in South America, where Guarani and Spanish coexist in every conversation. Explore the imposing ruins of the Jesuit Missions of Trinidad and Jesus, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Discover the art of nanduti, the needle lace that artisans weave like spider webs, and ao po'i, the exquisitely fine cotton fabric passed down through generations. Savor sopa paraguaya, chipa, and terere while wandering through markets and festivals that keep an ancient culture alive.

invest.meta_description: Discover why Paraguay is South America's most attractive investment destination: 10% flat tax, territorial system, fast residency, and real estate opportunities.
invest.hero_subtitle: The best-kept secret of smart investors in South America
invest.intro: Paraguay offers one of the most competitive tax regimes in the world: a flat 10% income tax, a territorial tax system that does not tax foreign-sourced income, and a permanent residency process that can be completed in weeks, not years. With a stable economy, low cost of living, and a strategic location in the heart of Mercosur, Paraguay has become the go-to destination for entrepreneurs, digital nomads, and investors looking to maximize their wealth with legal certainty.
invest.residency_description: Obtain your permanent residency in Paraguay in as little as 45 days. No minimum stay requirements and full Mercosur access.
invest.tax_description: Flat 10% income tax rate. Territorial system: you pay no taxes on income generated outside of Paraguay.
invest.real_estate_description: From rural land to urban developments in Asuncion and Encarnacion. Paraguay's real estate market offers exceptional returns.
invest.calculator_description: Calculate how much you could save in taxes and what your return on investment would be by relocating to Paraguay.

leisure.meta_title: Leisure & Relaxation in Paraguay | Tape Paraguay
leisure.meta_description: Enjoy the relaxed side of Paraguay: Encarnacion beaches, Asuncion nightlife, gourmet dining, weekend getaways, and more.
leisure.hero_subtitle: Because Paraguay also knows how to have a good time
leisure.intro: Not everything in Paraguay is jungle and adventure. Discover the golden sand beaches of Encarnacion, the Paraguayan Miami, where the Encarnacion Carnival rivals the best on the continent. Enjoy Asuncion's growing food scene, where young chefs fuse Guarani cuisine with international techniques. Escape for a weekend to Lake Ypacarai, tour artisanal wineries, relax in thermal spas, or simply sit in a colonial plaza with a terere in hand and let Paraguayan time work its magic.

footer.about_text: Tape Paraguay is your gateway to one of South America's most authentic destinations. We design travel experiences, investment advisory, and relocation services for those seeking to discover the real Paraguay.

legal.terms_s1_text: By accessing and using the Tape Paraguay website and services, you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.
legal.terms_s2_text: Tape Paraguay provides travel planning, tour booking, investment advisory, and relocation assistance services in Paraguay. All services are subject to availability and confirmation.
legal.terms_s3_text: All bookings require a deposit to confirm. Full payment is due 30 days before the start of the tour or service. Prices are quoted in USD unless otherwise stated. Payment methods accepted include bank transfer, credit card, and PayPal.
legal.terms_s4_text: Please refer to our separate Cancellation Policy for detailed information about cancellation terms and refund procedures.
legal.terms_s5_text: Tape Paraguay acts as an intermediary between travelers and service providers. While we carefully select our partners, we cannot be held liable for the actions or omissions of third-party providers. We recommend travelers obtain comprehensive travel insurance.
legal.terms_s6_text: All content on this website, including text, images, logos, and design, is the property of Tape Paraguay and is protected by copyright laws. Unauthorized reproduction or distribution is prohibited.
legal.terms_s7_text: Your use of our services is also governed by our Privacy Policy. Please review it to understand how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
legal.terms_s8_text: These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Paraguay. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Asuncion, Paraguay.
legal.terms_s9_text: Tape Paraguay reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date. Continued use of our services constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.
legal.privacy_s1_text: We collect information you provide directly to us, including your name, email address, phone number, and any other information you submit through our forms. We also collect usage data through cookies and analytics tools.
legal.privacy_s2_text: We use your personal information to provide and improve our services, respond to your inquiries, process bookings, send you relevant communications, and comply with legal obligations.
legal.privacy_s3_text: We do not sell or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share your information with trusted service providers who assist us in operating our website and conducting our business, such as tour operators and accommodation providers, only as necessary to fulfill your booking.
legal.privacy_s4_text: Our website uses cookies to enhance your browsing experience, analyze traffic, and personalize content. You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings.
legal.privacy_s5_text: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.
legal.privacy_s6_text: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You can also opt out of marketing communications at any time by clicking the unsubscribe link in our emails or contacting us directly.
legal.privacy_s7_text: Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of those websites. We encourage you to read the privacy policies of any website you visit.
legal.privacy_s8_text: Our services are not directed to individuals under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.
legal.privacy_s9_text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new policy on this page with an updated effective date.
legal.privacy_s10_text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at info@tapeparaguay.com.
legal.cancel_s1_text: We understand that plans can change. The following cancellation terms apply to all tour bookings:
legal.cancel_s1_item1: More than 30 days before departure: Full refund minus a $50 USD administrative fee.
legal.cancel_s1_item2: 15-30 days before departure: 50% refund of the total booking amount.
legal.cancel_s1_item3: 7-14 days before departure: 25% refund of the total booking amount.
legal.cancel_s1_item4: Less than 7 days before departure: No refund.
legal.cancel_s2_text: In the unlikely event that we need to cancel a tour, you will receive a full refund or the option to reschedule at no additional cost. Cancellations may occur due to insufficient group size, extreme weather conditions, or safety concerns.
legal.cancel_s3_text: If you wish to modify your booking (change dates, group size, or tour type), please contact us at least 14 days before your scheduled departure. Modifications are subject to availability and may incur additional costs depending on the changes requested.
legal.cancel_s4_text: For investment advisory and residency assistance services, cancellation terms are outlined in the individual service agreement provided at the time of booking. Generally, professional fees for work already completed are non-refundable.
legal.cancel_s5_text: In cases of force majeure (natural disasters, pandemics, government restrictions, or other events beyond our control), Tape Paraguay will work with you to reschedule your experience or provide a credit for future use. Refunds in force majeure situations are handled on a case-by-case basis.
legal.cancel_s6_text: We strongly recommend that all travelers purchase comprehensive travel insurance that covers trip cancellation, medical emergencies, and evacuation. Tape Paraguay is not responsible for costs arising from the traveler's failure to obtain adequate insurance.
legal.cancel_s7_text: To cancel a booking, please contact us via email at info@tapeparaguay.com or through WhatsApp. Cancellation requests must be made in writing. The date of your written cancellation request will determine the applicable refund percentage.

about.hero_subtitle: How a motorcycle, a dream, and thousands of kilometers created Tape Paraguay
about.journey_text: It all started with a motorcycle and a map full of unnamed roads. Francisco Zubia rode across Paraguay from end to end, sleeping in indigenous communities, sharing terere with Chaco ranchers, and discovering corners that even Paraguayans themselves did not know. That journey showed him a country the world needed to see.
about.mission_text: To make Paraguay accessible to the world. Not as just another tourist destination, but as a transformative experience. We connect travelers, investors, and seekers of a new life with the authenticity of a country that can still truly be discovered. Every route we design, every guide we create, and every consultation we provide is born from the same passion that put Francisco on that motorcycle.
about.value_authenticity_text: We do not sell postcards. We show you the real Paraguay, with its raw beauty and genuine people.
about.value_sustainability_text: We work with local communities and promote tourism that leaves a positive footprint.
about.value_expertise_text: We know every road, every corner, and every opportunity because we traveled them firsthand.
about.story_p1: In 2016, Francisco Zubia got on his motorcycle in Buenos Aires with a backpack and a dream. Four years and 30,000 kilometers later, he had crossed jungles, deserts, volcanoes, and 15 countries — from Patagonia to California. But it was in Paraguay where he found something he wasn't looking for: a home.
about.story_p2: Today, Francisco channels that same explorer's passion into Tape Paraguay, designing experiences that reveal the best of this extraordinary country to travelers and investors from around the world.

faq.title: 자주 묻는 질문
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before traveling to or investing in Paraguay. If your question is not here, write to us and we will respond personally.
faq.a_1: Yes, Paraguay is generally safe for tourists. Like any country, it is important to exercise normal precautions, especially in larger cities. Most tourist areas are very welcoming, and Paraguayans are known for their friendliness and hospitality.
faq.q_2: What is the best time of year to visit Paraguay?
faq.a_2: The best time to visit Paraguay is during the cooler months from May to September (autumn/winter), when temperatures are pleasant and rainfall is lower. For Encarnacion's Carnival, visit in January-February. For wildlife in the Chaco, June-August offers the best sightings.
faq.q_3: Do I need a visa to enter Paraguay?
faq.a_3: Citizens of most countries in the Americas and Europe can enter Paraguay without a visa for stays up to 90 days. Check with your nearest Paraguayan consulate for the most current visa requirements based on your nationality.
faq.q_4: What languages are spoken in Paraguay?
faq.a_4: Paraguay is uniquely bilingual. Both Spanish and Guarani are official languages, and most Paraguayans speak both. In tourist areas and major cities, you will also find people who speak English and Portuguese.
faq.q_5: How does Paraguay's 10% flat tax work?
faq.a_5: Paraguay has a simple and competitive tax system with a flat 10% income tax rate. It operates on a territorial basis, meaning income earned outside of Paraguay is not taxed. This makes it extremely attractive for remote workers, digital nomads, and international investors.
faq.q_6: How long does it take to get residency in Paraguay?
faq.a_6: The permanent residency process in Paraguay can be completed in as little as 45 days. Requirements include a background check, proof of income or investment, and basic documentation. There is no minimum stay requirement to maintain your residency.
faq.q_7: What currency is used in Paraguay?
faq.a_7: The Paraguayan Guarani (PYG) is the official currency. US Dollars are widely accepted in tourist areas and for real estate transactions. ATMs are available in cities and accept international cards.
faq.q_8: What are the must-see destinations in Paraguay?
faq.a_8: Key destinations include: the Jesuit Missions of Trinidad and Jesus (UNESCO World Heritage), the Gran Chaco for wildlife, Encarnacion for beaches and nightlife, Asuncion for culture and gastronomy, Ybycui National Park for waterfalls, and the Pantanal wetlands.
faq.q_9: Can I drink the tap water in Paraguay?
faq.a_9: In major cities like Asuncion and Encarnacion, tap water is generally treated and safe. However, we recommend drinking bottled or filtered water, especially when traveling in rural areas or the Chaco region.
faq.q_10: What should I pack for a trip to Paraguay?
faq.a_10: Pack light, breathable clothing for hot weather, but bring layers for cooler evenings in winter. For Chaco expeditions, bring long sleeves, insect repellent, and sturdy shoes. Sunscreen and a hat are essential year-round. Check our Travel Tools section for a detailed packing list.
faq.q_11: How do I book a tour with Tape Paraguay?
faq.a_11: You can book a tour through our website by filling out the booking form on any tour page, contacting us directly via WhatsApp, or sending us an email. We will work with you to customize your experience based on your interests and travel dates.
faq.q_12: What is the cost of living in Paraguay?
faq.a_12: Paraguay has one of the lowest costs of living in South America. A comfortable lifestyle in Asuncion can be achieved for $1,500-2,500 USD per month, including rent, food, transportation, and entertainment. Rural areas are even more affordable.

invest_residency.meta_description: Complete guide to obtaining permanent residency in Paraguay: requirements, documents, costs, timelines, and benefits of the immigration process.
invest_residency.title: Permanent Residency in Paraguay
invest_residency.subtitle: Get your residency in as little as 45 days with minimal requirements and Mercosur access
invest_residency.intro: Paraguay offers one of the fastest and most accessible residency processes in the world. With no minimum stay requirements, reduced costs, and full Mercosur access, it is the preferred option for entrepreneurs, digital nomads, and investors seeking a second residency or citizenship.
invest_residency.req_income: Proof of income or bank deposit (approx. $5,500 USD)
invest_residency.step_4: Day 30-45: Issuance of Paraguayan ID card
invest_residency.benefit_1: No minimum stay requirement to maintain residency
invest_residency.benefit_2: Free access to Mercosur (Argentina, Brazil, Uruguay, etc.)
invest_residency.benefit_3: Path to Paraguayan citizenship after 3 years
invest_residency.benefit_4: Territorial tax system: foreign income is not taxed
invest_residency.benefit_5: Cost of living up to 70% lower than Europe or the US
invest_residency.benefit_6: Family process: spouse and children can apply together
invest_residency.disclaimer: This information is for guidance purposes. We recommend consulting with a licensed attorney in Paraguay for personalized legal advice.

invest_tax.meta_description: Discover Paraguay's tax regime: 10% flat tax, territorial system, 10% VAT, and why it's the favorite tax destination for investors and digital nomads.
invest_tax.title: Paraguay Tax Benefits
invest_tax.subtitle: A tax system designed to attract global investment and talent
invest_tax.intro: Paraguay has one of the most competitive tax regimes in the world. Its combination of low rates, territorial system, and administrative simplicity make it the preferred destination for those seeking to optimize their tax burden legally.
invest_tax.income_tax_desc: Flat rate on net income. No progressive brackets, no surprises.
invest_tax.vat_desc: Uniform 10% Value Added Tax (5% for basic products).
invest_tax.territorial_desc: Income generated outside Paraguay is NOT taxed in Paraguay.
invest_tax.ideal_remote_desc: If your clients are outside Paraguay, your income is tax-free.
invest_tax.ideal_investors_desc: Foreign dividends and investments are not subject to taxation.
invest_tax.ideal_entrepreneurs_desc: Low local tax burden and zero tax on international income.
invest_tax.ideal_retirees_desc: Foreign pensions are not taxed in Paraguay.
invest_tax.disclaimer: This information is for guidance purposes and does not constitute tax advice. Consult a licensed accountant in Paraguay.

invest_realestate.meta_title: Real Estate in Paraguay | Tape Paraguay
invest_realestate.meta_description: Invest in Paraguay real estate: property market in Asuncion, Encarnacion, rural land, urban developments, and investment returns.
invest_realestate.title: Real Estate in Paraguay
invest_realestate.subtitle: A growing property market with exceptional returns
invest_realestate.intro: Paraguay's real estate market is booming, driven by a stable economy, low inflation, and growing demand for housing and commercial spaces. From premium developments in Asuncion to productive rural land, opportunities are vast and returns surpass those of mature markets.
invest_realestate.zone_asuncion_desc: The country's capital with the highest demand. Neighborhoods like Villa Morra, Carmelitas, and Manora offer high appreciation. Premium tower developments on the rise.
invest_realestate.zone_encarnacion_desc: The jewel of the south. Renovated waterfront, growing tourism, and still-accessible prices with high appreciation potential.
invest_realestate.zone_luque_desc: Metropolitan area expansion. Gated communities, shopping centers, and great connectivity to Asuncion.
invest_realestate.zone_rural_desc: Agricultural and cattle land with production returns. Soy, cattle, and forestry lead rural investment.
invest_realestate.adv_1: Foreigners can purchase property without restrictions
invest_realestate.adv_2: Prices up to 80% lower than Buenos Aires or Sao Paulo
invest_realestate.adv_3: Low property tax (1% of fiscal value)
invest_realestate.adv_5: Sustained appreciation of 5-15% annually in prime areas
